title: Find your ideal hair primer and watch your mane transform!
description: LIFESTYLE NEWS - Everyone can benefit from a...
bodyText:
LIFESTYLE NEWS - Everyone can benefit from a hair primer to make styling easier and better, but finding the best one for your mane is key.

Whether your hair is thick, thin, curly, straight, damaged, or coloured, there’s a primer perfect for you…and we’re here to help you find it! Take a look:


> Best hair primers for dry hair


- Redken All Soft Mega Curls Hydramelt Leave-In Conditioner: This ultra-hydrating hyaluronic acid primer will benefit your hair significantly, helping with moisture retention, split ends, frizz, and heat protection.
- Kérastase Nutritive Lotion Thermique Sublimatrice: For a nourished, polished blowout, this thermo-seal glaze smooths, adds shine, and makes hair easier to style, even with frequent heat styling.

Best hair primers for all hair types

- Redken One United Multi-Benefit Leave-In Conditioner: This comprehensive formula addresses all hair care concerns and is suitable for all hair types. We love it for daily use.
- Mizani 25 Miracle Milk Leave-In Conditioner: is a multi-use primer with 25 benefits, including priming hair for styling, detangling, and controlling fly-aways.


> Best hair primers for damaged or weakened hair


Redken Acidic Bonding Concentrate Leave-In Conditioner (R570-00) is formulated with citric acid and a bonding care complex, making this primer intensely conditioning while repairing hair, providing heat protection and reducing breakage.

Best hair primers for heat styling for heat protection up to 230°C!

- Redken Frizz Dismiss Rebel Tame Leave-In Cream. This smoothing cream, with sustainably sourced babassu oil, controls frizz while hydrating, detangling, and protecting from heat.
- Acid Color Gloss Activated Glass Gloss Treatment is a professional-strength glossing treatment that deeply conditions hair, leaving it with an intense, molecular-level shine for up to 3 days!
- Kérastase Discipline Spray Fluidissime makes styling easier as it smoothes and protects your hair and it’s anti-frizz!
- L’Oréal Professionnel Vitamino Color 10-In-1 Perfecting Multi-Purpose Spray is a primer spray for colour-treated hair offering ten benefits, including heat protection, shine-boosting, and frizz smoothing.
- Kérastase Première Sèrum Filler Fondamental is a lightweight, repairing. anti-frizz serum with peptide and glycine that locks out frizz and visibly reduces split ends.

For more on beauty, visit Get It Magazine.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
